title: Mojtaba Khamenei, Son of Iran’s Slain Supreme Leader, Is a Mysterious Figure
summary_full: The succession of the slain leader’s son is seen as a signal of the Islamic republic’s defiance of Israel and the United States, and of continuity during crisis.
summary_public: The succession of the slain leader’s son is seen as a signal of the Islamic republic’s defiance of Israel and the United States, and of continuity during crisis.
